blockingIssues.description: ServerState initializes AmbientService with a no-op on_note callback (`lambda raw, summary: None`), so ambient captures started via `/ambient/start` are not persisted to Obsidian notes.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/architecture.md` to reflect flattened services helpers and the current 8-tab keybinding scheme (`Ctrl+1-8`, ambient on `Ctrl+Shift+6`).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add assignment guidance that TUI-touching features should default to `fullstack-worker` (or explicitly document allowed backend-worker exceptions) to avoid skill-boundary mismatches.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature `fix-lint-typecheck-bindings` required substantial `inbox.py` edits while assigned to `backend-worker`; reviewer flagged this mismatch.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Relax the mandatory RED-first test step for fix-only tasks (lint/type/import repairs) by adding an explicit exception path when restoring already-failing suites.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both reviews for milestone features recorded RED-step deviations/friction for repair-style work.

rejectedObservations.observation: Change `.factory/services.yaml` default `test` command to always run the full suite instead of skipping audio/llm tests.
